title: 10mm Black Ribbon for Gift Wrapping,22m Fabric Thick Satin Ribbon Black Bow for Gift Wrapping,Ribbons for Balloons,Crafting,Hair,Bouquets,Wedding, Car,Presents,Cake,Christmas Party Decorations
features: Material:100% polyester,smooth & silk surface without wrinkles，satin ribbon is constructed of density weave, very well made without fraying ends or loosing strings anywhere.

Size: We provide a variety of different width to meet your different needs:10mm,20mm,40mm,50mm,75mm,100mm /22 meters per roll,3mm/6mm /91meters per roll,Variety of colors are available for all your needs.

Versatile Ribbons:The stain ribbon for a variety of uses,Great for use on Christmas decorations, wreaths and garlands,wedding cars and all wedding decorations, Clothing,seasonal decorations, hair Ribbon Bows, Cake decorating, Gift box wrapping,DIY and so on.

Decorate Your presents: a well-craft package that protects inner gifts well, highlight your mind and show your tastes, the satin ribbons can be cut to any length, come with bright colors, can be applied as a gift to send your friends, families or others who like craft projects, will make their day full of joy.

Widely Used: Our ribbons are easy to cut, can well meet your daily needs, such as wrapping presents, Champagne, Bouquet and decoring balloon, decoration, braided headbands. Suit for celebrating Christmas, birthday, wedding, graduation, baby shower, bride to be party, bachelor party and more.
description: Ｍaterial: This set of ribbon rolls is made of polyester fabric, smooth and comfortable texture, ribbon for crafts easy to bend and twist Size:Width:10mm /Length: 22m Note:Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. Package: 1 rolls 22m satin ribbon
